macro.intro: The macroeconomic landscape is characterized by rising inflation with CPI YoY at 330.29% and geopolitical tensions affecting energy prices. The Fed Funds Rate remains steady at 3.64%, while the 10Y-2Y Yield Spread narrows to 0.5%. No major economic events are scheduled today, allowing markets to digest recent data and geopolitical developments.

snapshot.name: WTI Crude Oil
snapshot.note: Supply concerns due to Strait of Hormuz closure

setups.name: Gold Long Setup
setups.rationale: Gold is rallying due to increased safe-haven demand as geopolitical tensions rise. With CPI YoY at 330.29%, inflationary pressures support higher gold prices. The lack of major economic events today allows for a focus on geopolitical developments.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No major events, focus on geopolitics

metrics.label: Fear & Greed Index
metrics.text: Fear supports gold as a safe haven

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Resolution of geopolitical tensions could lower gold prices

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Unexpected Fed rate hike could strengthen USD

setups.hedge: Consider shorting EUR/USD at 1.1000 if gold weakens.

setups.name: S&P 500 Short Setup
setups.rationale: The S&P 500 is approaching overbought levels with a strong rally. The market is in extremely overbought territory, as noted by CNBC. The narrowing 10Y-2Y Yield Spread at 0.5% suggests caution.

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Positive earnings surprises could support index

setups.hedge: Consider long VIX at 18.00 as a volatility hedge.

setups.name: EUR/USD Long Setup
setups.rationale: EUR/USD is gaining as the dollar sheds its Iran war premium. With the Fed Funds Rate steady at 3.64%, the euro benefits from relative stability. No major economic events today allow for focus on currency movements.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No events, focus on FX trends

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Unexpected USD strength could push EUR/USD below 1.0850

setups.hedge: Consider shorting GBP/USD at 1.2500 if EUR/USD weakens.

contrarian.body: WTI Crude Oil is up 2.10% today due to supply concerns. However, the EU warns of prolonged energy shocks, suggesting potential overpricing. A short position could capitalize on a resolution in the Strait of Hormuz.
contrarian.warning: A sudden escalation in geopolitical tensions could spike oil prices. Monitor news closely for any developments.

avoid.reason: Launch of ChatGPT app may not impact stock today amid broader market focus.
